name: CIRADS (Chest Imaging Reporting and Data System)
description: CIRADS classification template for lung cancer screening CT assessment

findings.technique: Low-dose non-contrast chest CT performed for lung cancer screening at [X]mAs with [reconstruction algorithm]. 3D volume rendered images obtained.
findings.comparison: Comparison made with [prior CT] from [date]. [New / Interval change / Stable] finding.

sections.name: Nodule Type
sections.content: Nodule type: [solid / part-solid / ground glass / calcified].

sections.name: Density
sections.content: Attenuation: [X] HU. Internal characteristics: [homogeneous / heterogeneous / cavitation / calcification].

sections.name: Growth Assessment
sections.content: Volume doubling time: [X] days. [Consistent / Not consistent] with benign etiology.

impression:
1. CIRADS [X]: [category description]
2. [Nodule type] nodule in [location] measuring [X]mm
3. [Risk assessment and reasoning]
4. [Follow-up / PET / Biopsy / Surgical consultation] recommended
5. Additional findings: [list]
author: RadReport Templates
